du More information about CS enrollments Peer Advisors Christopher Lee Peer Advisor Hi! I’m Christopher, a 4th-year Computer Science major originally from Korea. Having navigated nearly four years of the CS curriculum, I understand the challenges of

the CS curriculum, I understand the challenges of balancing rigorous coursework, projects, and finding your path within the vast field of computer science. As someone who genuinely enjoys helping others, I’m here to guide you through course planning,

rs, I’m here to guide you through course planning, academic decisions, and discovering what areas of CS excite you most. Whether you’re struggling with algorithms, exploring different CS tracks, or just need someone to talk through your academic jour

st need someone to talk through your academic journey, I’m excited to help you make the most of your time at Berkeley! Anuska Parajuli Peer Advisor Hello! My name is Anuska, and I’m a junior majoring in Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences. I

in Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences. I’m passionate about empowering and supporting first-generation students as they navigate EE/CS. I truly love EECS here at Berkeley, and I hope to help others discover their own excitement for CS and E

others discover their own excitement for CS and Engineering. In my free time, I enjoy running, videography, traveling, and discovering new hiking viewpoints across the Bay Area. Peer Advising Schedule For the most up-to-date guidance on the CS major
